## Scope check

This repo is the lane-agnostic, secret-free **governance core**.
Application-specific agents, hooks, and integrations belong in your own repo
(see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). Examples that teach the
framework are welcome.

- [ ] This belongs in the open-source core, not a downstream repo.
